nodes.label: Pathogenesis & Immunology
nodes.summary: Mechanisms of demyelination, immune activation, and the cells and cytokines driving MS.

nodes.label: Imaging & Biomarkers
nodes.summary: MRI, optical coherence tomography, and fluid biomarkers that track lesion burden and disease activity.

nodes.summary: Disease-modifying therapies, trial design, and emerging treatment targets.

nodes.label: Clinical Care & Management
nodes.summary: Symptom management, rehabilitation, and the day-to-day care of people with MS.

nodes.label: Epidemiology & Population Health
nodes.summary: Incidence, prevalence, environmental and genetic risk factors, and population-level outcomes.
